title: stephanomeria ramosa
intro: Stephanomeria ramosa, also known as Desert Hesperletta, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stephanomeria ramosa include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
